events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr. Which Beatles track always gets your head bopping?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God & Astrophysicist
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock royalty. What's your favourite Queen riff he gave us?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Still rolling after all these years! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV first hit our screens 45 years ago today? It kicked off with The Buggles' iconic 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did you watch it live?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which went straight to number one in the UK.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. From 'Supersonic' to 'Live Forever', what's your standout track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's the first performance that comes to mind when you think of the iconic festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King. Today marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, a true icon who forever changed music. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in a drive-by incident in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering a legend gone too soon. It's 30 years since Tupac Shakur's tragic death. His music and message still resonate today. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely considered one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the maestro. Today marks 56 years since the world lost the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing, those timeless tracks... what's your favourite from their final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman and rock icon Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Hynde's Birthday Rock
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude defined an era. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis co-founder and frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad for Liam
angles.copy: You know the voice, you know the swagger! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your top Oasis track featuring his iconic vocals?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released (UK, 1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was re-released in the UK on October 24, 1975, as part of his 'Shaved Fish' compilation.

angles.name: Imagine UK Re-release
angles.copy: 49 years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' saw a UK re-release. Its message of peace and unity is as powerful today as it ever was. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple announced the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the device that changed how we listen to music forever. A true game-changer!

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as Global James Bond Day, marking the 1962 premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Today we celebrate 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: Remembering a true visionary. John Lennon would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
